metaTitle: Clinique du VR | RV water leak, maintenance and repair in Gatineau
metaDescription: Clinique du VR helps in Gatineau with RV water leaks, seal and roof maintenance, inspection, and repair, serving Outaouais, Ottawa, and the Laurentides.

hero.logoAlt: Clinique du VR logo — maintenance, repair and detailing for recreational vehicles
hero.title: RV Inspection, Maintenance and Repair in Gatineau

introCard.heading: Why choose Clinique du VR?
introCard.body: Specialized and attentive service for RV maintenance, repair and detailing. We focus on clear explanations, a practical reading of the vehicle's condition, and recommendations tailored to your actual situation. We have a year-round workshop as well as a mobile unit to serve you better depending on the type of work needed. We also offer a separate auto and truck detailing page, workshop only. Speed, transparency, and careful execution from start to finish are part of how we work.

seoSections.heading: RV service in Gatineau and nearby areas
seoSections.body: Clinique du VR supports owners of RVs, travel trailers, and caravans with the most common needs: pre-purchase inspection, preventive maintenance, water leak repair, roof work, restoration, and detailing. Our workshop in Gatineau also serves the greater Ottawa region, Outaouais, and the Laurentides, as well as selected files elsewhere in Quebec and Ontario.

seoSections.heading: A useful approach before any work begins
seoSections.body: When a vehicle shows signs of wear, water intrusion, or visible deterioration, the first step is to clarify the RV's actual condition. We then help you choose between an inspection, maintenance, repair, detailing service, or pre-sale preparation based on what is most useful.

cta.heading: Request your free estimate
cta.subheading: Inspection and estimate with no obligation

contactForm.heading: Contact us
contactForm.unconfiguredNote: The contact form is not available at the moment. Please use the phone number or online booking in the meantime.

contactPanel.heading: Contact Information
contactPanel.ctaText: Free and confidential estimate. Call us or fill out the form.

items.quote: Cedric was on time, explained everything clearly, and the results followed as promised. Two thumbs up.
items.author: Jesse Brook

items.quote: Efficient company, easy to communicate with. Professional work, nothing but positive.
items.author: Philippe Albert
